Endpoints.Name: getGifsById
Endpoints.Description: A multiget version of the get GIF by ID endpoint.

400.Name: response400
400.Description: Your request was formatted incorrectly or missing required parameters.

403.Name: response403
403.Description: You weren't authorized to make your request; most likely this indicates an issue with your API Key.

404.Name: response404
404.Description: The particular GIF you are requesting was not found. This occurs, for example, if you request a GIF by an id that does not exist.

429.Name: response429
429.Description: Your API Key is making too many requests. Read about [requesting a Production Key](https://developers.giphy.com/docs/#access) to upgrade your API Key rate limits.

Parameters.Name: ids
Parameters.Description: Filters results by specified GIF IDs, separated by commas.

Errors.ErrorMessage: Your request was formatted incorrectly or missing required parameters.
You weren't authorized to make your request; most likely this indicates an issue with your API Key.
The particular GIF you are requesting was not found. This occurs, for example, if you request a GIF by an id that does not exist.
Your API Key is making too many requests. Read about [requesting a Production Key](https://developers.giphy.com/docs/#access) to upgrade your API Key rate limits.

Endpoints.Name: randomGif
Endpoints.Description: Returns a random GIF, limited by tag. Excluding the tag parameter will return a random GIF from the GIPHY catalog.

Endpoints.Name: searchGifs
Endpoints.Description: Search all GIPHY GIFs for a word or phrase. Punctuation will be stripped and ignored.  Use a plus or url encode for phrases. Example paul+rudd, ryan+gosling or american+psycho.

400.Name: response400
400.Description: Your request was formatted incorrectly or missing required parameters.

403.Name: response403
403.Description: You weren't authorized to make your request; most likely this indicates an issue with your API Key.

404.Name: response404
404.Description: The particular GIF you are requesting was not found. This occurs, for example, if you request a GIF by an id that does not exist.

429.Name: response429
429.Description: Your API Key is making too many requests. Read about [requesting a Production Key](https://developers.giphy.com/docs/#access) to upgrade your API Key rate limits.

Parameters.Name: limit
Parameters.Description: The maximum number of records to return.

Parameters.Name: lang
Parameters.Description: Specify default language for regional content; use a 2-letter ISO 639-1 language code.

Endpoints.Name: trendingGifs
Endpoints.Description: Fetch GIFs currently trending online. Hand curated by the GIPHY editorial team.  The data returned mirrors the GIFs showcased on the GIPHY homepage. Returns 25 results by default.

Fields.Name: bitly_url
Fields.Description: The unique bit.ly URL for this GIF

Fields.Name: content_url
Fields.Description: Currently unused

Fields.Name: create_datetime
Fields.Description: The date this GIF was added to the GIPHY database.

Fields.Name: embded_url
Fields.Description: A URL used for embedding this GIF

Fields.Name: featured_tags
Fields.Description: An array of featured tags for this GIF (Note: Not available when using the Public Beta Key)

Fields.Name: id
Fields.Description: This GIF's unique ID

Fields.Name: images
Fields.Description: An object containing data for various available formats and sizes of this GIF.

Fields.Name: import_datetime
Fields.Description: The creation or upload date from this GIF's source.

Fields.Name: rating
Fields.Description: The MPAA-style rating for this content. Examples include Y, G, PG, PG-13 and R

Fields.Name: slug
Fields.Description: The unique slug used in this GIF's URL

Fields.Name: source
Fields.Description: The page on which this GIF was found

Fields.Name: source_post_url
Fields.Description: The URL of the webpage on which this GIF was found.

Fields.Name: source_tld
Fields.Description: The top level domain of the source URL.

Fields.Name: tags
Fields.Description: An array of tags for this GIF (Note: Not available when using the Public Beta Key)

Fields.Name: trending_datetime
Fields.Description: The date on which this gif was marked trending, if applicable.

Fields.Name: type
Fields.Description: Type of the gif. By default, this is almost always gif

Fields.Name: update_datetime
Fields.Description: The date on which this GIF was last updated.

Fields.Name: url
Fields.Description: The unique URL for this GIF

Fields.Name: user
Fields.Description: The User Object contains information about the user associated with a GIF and URLs to assets such as that user's avatar image, profile, and more.

Fields.Name: username
Fields.Description: The username this GIF is attached to, if applicable

Fields.Name: frames
Fields.Description: The number of frames in this GIF.

Fields.Name: height
Fields.Description: The height of this GIF in pixels.

Fields.Name: mp4
Fields.Description: The URL for this GIF in .MP4 format.

Fields.Name: mp4_size
Fields.Description: The size in bytes of the .MP4 file corresponding to this GIF.

Fields.Name: size
Fields.Description: The size of this GIF in bytes.

Fields.Name: url
Fields.Description: The publicly-accessible direct URL for this GIF.

Fields.Name: webp
Fields.Description: The URL for this GIF in .webp format.

Fields.Name: webp_size
Fields.Description: The size in bytes of the .webp file corresponding to this GIF.

Fields.Name: width
Fields.Description: The width of this GIF in pixels.

CustomTypes.Name: Meta
CustomTypes.Description: The Meta Object contains basic information regarding the request, whether it was successful, and the response given by the API.  Check `responses` to see a description of types of response codes the API might give you under different cirumstances.

Fields.Name: msg
Fields.Description: HTTP Response Message

Fields.Name: response_id
Fields.Description: A unique ID paired with this response from the API.

Fields.Name: status
Fields.Description: HTTP Response Code

CustomTypes.Name: Pagination
CustomTypes.Description: The Pagination Object contains information relating to the number of total results available as well as the number of results fetched and their relative positions.

Fields.Name: count
Fields.Description: Total number of items returned.

Fields.Name: offset
Fields.Description: Position in pagination.

Fields.Name: total_count
Fields.Description: Total number of items available.

CustomTypes.Name: User
CustomTypes.Description: The User Object contains information about the user associated with a GIF and URLs to assets such as that user's avatar image, profile, and more.

Fields.Name: avatar_url
Fields.Description: The URL for this user's avatar image.

Fields.Name: banner_url
Fields.Description: The URL for the banner image that appears atop this user's profile page.

Fields.Name: display_name
Fields.Description: The display name associated with this user (contains formatting the base username might not).

Fields.Name: profile_url
Fields.Description: The URL for this user's profile.

Fields.Name: twitter
Fields.Description: The Twitter username associated with this user, if applicable.

Fields.Name: username
Fields.Description: The username associated with this user.
